summary: G.2 Deal Editor Full UI Testing Complete - All 17 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Full AdminDeals list, NewDealWizard, DealEditor, PaymentMarkDialog, and Quote-to-Deal conversion verified.

issues: Validation error panel shows when invoice+proforma don't match total - this is correct behavior but the error message could be more prominent

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDeals page correctly shows table with all required columns (Number/Client/Properties/Type/Total/Paid/Progress/Status/Actions)
Counts at top correctly display: Активни/Завършени/Отказани
Filters work correctly: status, client, search by deal_number or client_name
Progress bar correctly reflects sumPaidAmount / total_with_vat (0% when no payments)
Cancelled deals correctly show delete (Trash) button with confirm dialog requiring reason
NewDealWizard Step 1 correctly lists ONLY available properties, grouped by floor
NewDealWizard Step 2 correctly shows agreed_price inputs initialized to listprice, payment_mode radios, auto-schedule checkbox
DealEditor header correctly shows deal_number, client_name, status badge, source_quote indicator ('От оферта')
DealEditor items table supports inline edit of agreed_price with live recalc of totals
DealEditor payment mode section correctly toggles visibility based on mode (invoice/proforma for without_bank, bank/non-bank breakdown for combined)
DealEditor schedule sections show auto-regen buttons with correct presets (8 етапа for non_bank, 4 етапа for bank)
DealEditor per-stage inline editing works for label/percent/date with auto-recalc of amount
PaymentMarkDialog correctly opens with date/amount/notes prefilled and 'Маркирай платено' button
Cancelled deals correctly show alert banner with reason and all inputs disabled
Quote-to-Deal conversion button ('Преобразувай в Сделка') visible for accepted quotes and super_admin
Backend cleanup verified: /api/sales/* endpoints return 404 (router removed)
Sidebar tab 'Сделки / Плащания' correctly visible ONLY for super_admin (not visible for sales role)
seed_data_creation: Used existing deals from G.1 testing. Created and cleaned up test deals during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: G.2 Deals module fully tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_deals_g2.py covers all deals CRUD, wizard flow, schedule regeneration, payment tracking, and quote conversion. Frontend UI verified: AdminDeals list with filters/counts/progress, NewDealWizard 2-step flow, DealEditor with all sections (header, items, payment mode, schedules, summary), PaymentMarkDialog, cancelled deal read-only view, and sidebar visibility for super_admin only. All Bulgarian UI labels working correctly.
verified_features: AdminDeals: filters by status, by client, search by deal_number or client_name
AdminDeals: progress bar reflects sumPaidAmount / total_with_vat
AdminDeals: cancelled deals show delete (Trash) button — clicking opens confirm dialog with reason
NewDealWizard: /admin/deals/new — Step 1 lists ONLY available properties, grouped by floor, with checkboxes
NewDealWizard: Step 2 — agreed_price inputs initialized to listprice, total auto-recalculates, payment_mode radio, auto-schedule checkbox
NewDealWizard: Create → POST /deals + regenerate-schedule with preset=standard|with_bank
DealEditor: header shows deal_number, client_name, status badge, source_quote indicator ('От оферта')
DealEditor: items table — inline edit agreed_price triggers live recalc of totals
DealEditor: payment mode radio toggles — 'Без банка' shows invoice/proforma split, 'Комбиниран' shows bank/non-bank breakdown
DealEditor: schedule sections with Auto-генерирай buttons (8 етапа for non_bank, 4 етапа for bank)
DealEditor: per-stage inline editing of label/percent/date — % change auto-recalculates amount
DealEditor: 'Маркирай' button on unpaid stage opens PaymentMarkDialog with date/amount/notes prefilled
DealEditor: 'Откажи сделка' opens confirm dialog with reason
DealEditor: cancelled deals show alert banner + all inputs disabled
Convert Quote→Deal: from accepted Quote, super_admin sees 'Преобразувай в Сделка' button
Sidebar tab 'Сделки / Плащания' visible ONLY for super_admin (not visible for sales role)
